name: ai-furniture-hub
description: AI agent MCP server for furniture, home appliances, smart home, beauty devices, gadgets & more. 13 tools + 3 prompt workflows across 31 categories. Keyword, brand, dimension (mm), and color-alias search. Related-item chains link products to accessories, protection materials, and consumables. Rakuten Ichiba API for live search, Amazon affiliate URL generation.

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search curated catalog by keyword, brand, dimensions (mm), price, color (alias-aware), category. Returns related_items_hint for accessory chains.

tools.name: get_product_detail
tools.description: Full specs by product ID including inner dimensions, consumables, and compatible storage.

tools.name: search_rakuten_products
tools.description: Real-time Rakuten Ichiba search with affiliate URLs, prices, and reviews.

tools.name: search_amazon_products
tools.description: Amazon affiliate search link generation (URL only). SearchIndex auto-selected by category.

tools.name: coordinate_storage
tools.description: Shelf + storage box set proposals with quantity per tier and total cost.

tools.name: suggest_by_space
tools.description: Space dimensions (mm) → fitting products. Rotation-aware (checks swapped W/D).

tools.name: identify_product
tools.description: Visual feature text → product candidates with model number, specs, compatible storage.

tools.name: compare_products
tools.description: Side-by-side comparison of 2–5 products on price, size, load, reviews.

tools.name: find_replacement
tools.description: Discontinued model → successor/alternative from catalog + Rakuten.

tools.name: calc_room_layout
tools.description: Floor-plan rectangle packing simulation with placement coordinates.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: Browse all 31 categories with product counts, brands, and samples.

tools.name: get_popular_products
tools.description: Recommended products by category/brand with Rakuten trending data.

tools.name: get_related_items
tools.description: Related-item chain: required accessories, protection, consumables, add-ons with affiliate URLs. depth=2 for chains of chains.

prompts.name: room_coordinator
prompts.description: Complete space coordination: dimensions → shelf + boxes + protection with quantities and cost.

prompts.name: moving_checklist
prompts.description: Room-by-room purchasing checklist for a new home with budget estimates.

prompts.name: product_showdown
prompts.description: Detailed two-product comparison including accessory and running costs.

categories: 突っ張り棒・つっぱり
カーテン・ブラインド
ガジェット・モバイル
